title: Claims Knowledge Retrieval Hub
summary: Give claims teams fast, citation-backed answers from adjuster manuals, policy language, and historical resolution notes.
knowledge_base: User: claims operations teams retrieving policy and adjuster guidance.
Primary pain: fragmented knowledge slows routine claim decisions.
Decision output: grounded answer with cited documents and next step.
Business impact: faster handling and more consistent answers.

app_modules.label: Claim KB 01
app_modules.title: Grounded Claim Question
app_modules.description: Ask a claim operations question and retrieve the most relevant evidence.
app_modules.prefill: What documentation is required before approving a high-value auto glass replacement claim in California?

app_modules.label: Claim KB 02
app_modules.title: Knowledge Quality Review
app_modules.description: Compare answer quality and repeat-search behavior against the previous release.

app_modules.label: Claim KB 03
app_modules.title: Resolution Guidance
app_modules.description: Draft the next-step guidance for the claim specialist handling the case.
